sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Topics 139:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Topics 139:1
items.html: Because the light of Hesed, which is ZA, is a male in its origin of direct light, and a male does not become a female. In addition, VAK and GAR cannot be in one degree. (There)
